name: Intermediate lifter, hypertrophy focus, 6 days
description: Pure hypertrophy goal with no cardio. PPL or upper/lower with each muscle hit 2x/week, accumulation phase, RPE 7-8.
must_have: Each major muscle group trained ≥2x per week
Weekly working sets per muscle in the 12-20 range (intermediate hypertrophy)
Compound lift on each session with sets×reps×RPE specified
A deload week (volume cut 30-40%) within the 4-week block
Accumulation-style RPE targets (RPE 7-8, RIR 2-3) on main lifts
must_not_have: Lower-body sessions on consecutive days (e.g. legs Mon + legs Tue)
Sessions with no specific exercises listed (generic 'Push' with no contract)
RPE 9-10 on every working set during accumulation
Same muscle group trained 4x+ per week
Cardio sessions added (the athlete said no cardio)
